name: convert_currency
description: Converts a monetary amount from one currency to another using up-to-date exchange rates.

amount.description: The numeric amount to convert. Must be greater than 0.

from_currency.description: Source currency code following ISO 4217, e.g. 'USD', 'GBP', 'JPY'.

to_currency.description: Target currency code following ISO 4217, e.g. 'EUR', 'CAD', 'CNY'.
